name: Landing page feature timeline section displays feature showcase cards
description: Below the hero and dashboard preview on the landing page, a timeline/bento-grid feature showcase section renders multiple feature cards describing the platform's capabilities with icons and descriptions.

planSteps.description: Scroll down past the dashboard preview video section to the feature showcase area
Verify a feature showcase section is visible with multiple feature cards arranged in a layout, each card containing an icon, a heading, and descriptive text about a platform capability
Continue scrolling to the user count section
Verify an animated counter section is visible showing a number followed by a plus sign, with text reading 'Active Developers' and a subheading about building open source portfolios
Scroll to the comparison section further down
Verify a feature comparison section is visible showing how FirstIssue.dev compares to alternative approaches, laid out in a structured format with checkmarks or comparison indicators
